runTitle: Local Playwright Targeted QA - AI Chat UX Batch 1

coveredSurfaces: AI Chat empty welcome prompt cards

expertAssessments.rationale: Local Playwright smoke plus targeted component, quick, and contract gates cover the implemented AI Chat UI regression scope.

artifacts.label: Local AI Assistant empty chat smoke

notes: Implemented and verified B1, I2-I4, and M1-M5 from the AI Chat UI/UX plan.
Browser QA confirmed the local AI Assistant page title, welcome state, starter prompt presence, conversation counter, and zero console errors/warnings.
Tool menu bounded-height behavior is covered by component test, not by the local browser smoke.
